profile_basis.reason: No unowned ready [perf] bead was available; fj-lax dense/linalg roots were owned by IcyGlacier. Prior RCH profiles left vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 as the next unowned fj-dispatch hotspot after SVD.

baseline.tool: rch exec -- cargo bench -j 1 -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.lever: For DType::F64 only, batch_eigh_multi accumulated W/V into Vec<f64> and emitted TensorValue::new_f64_values, preserving the existing analytic/Jacobi arithmetic and fallback surfaces.
candidate.tool: rch exec -- cargo bench -j 1 -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_eigh/batched_matrix_3x3 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

delta.decision: Rejected because the same-worker gain is below the Score >= 2.0 keep gate.

isomorphism_proof_for_candidate.ordering: Each matrix slice was read in the same row-major order and dispatched through the same analytic_eigh_3x3 or eigh_decompose_matrix_into path.
isomorphism_proof_for_candidate.tie_breaking: Eigenvalue ordering continued to use the existing total_cmp/index ordering; eigenvector sign behavior was not changed.
isomorphism_proof_for_candidate.floating_point: No arithmetic expression, reassociation, FMA request, dtype conversion, or tolerance was changed; only the output container changed.
isomorphism_proof_for_candidate.rng: No RNG surface exists in the Eigh batching rule.
isomorphism_proof_for_candidate.fallbacks: Non-F64, non-rank3, non-square, non-leading batch movement, and error surfaces were unchanged.

validation.focused_tests: RCH remote vmi1227854 cargo test -j 1 -p fj-dispatch --lib eigh -- --nocapture: 6 passed, 0 failed.
validation.diff_check: git diff --check passed after source revert.
validation.source_state: Candidate source and test hunks were removed before commit; production code remains unchanged by this rejected pass.

next_route: Do not repeat Eigh output-storage micro-tuning. Reprofile and attack a different unowned dispatch primitive, or use alien-graveyard to choose a deeper algorithmic primitive if dispatch micro-levers keep failing.
